PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT(SUM(xsd:integer(REPLACE(STR(?attendance) , ',' , ''))) AS ?totalAttendance) WHERE {
  VALUES ?playoffType {
    wd:Q755589 wd:Q633904 wd:Q269350 wd:Q3819853
  }
  ?series wdt:P31 ?playoffType ; wdt:P710 wd:Q504309 .
  ?game wdt:P361 ?series ; wdt:P10833 ?attendance .
  FILTER(BOUND(?attendance) &&(REGEX(STR(?attendance) , '^\\d+,\\d+$') || DATATYPE(?attendance) = xsd:integer))
}
GROUP BY ?series
ORDER BY ASC(?totalAttendance)
LIMIT 1
OFFSET 2
